title: Dumped verilog with -P option gives default to all case expressions.

features.name: case statement with multiple case items
features.description: Code should include a case statement with multiple non-default case items using constant expressions

features.name: case item with constant integer expression
features.description: Code should include a case item with a constant integer expression as the case label

features.name: default case item in case statement
features.description: Code should include a case statement with an explicit default case item
